name: The Partywhores
description:
Level, after Level, after Level. It was starting to get exhausting. Finding food around these parts wasn't an easy task either. When can you finally get some peace for once? These fucking Entities we're around every corner too. Please just let it end already. You hoped you'd get lucky enough to get Level 11 after some time. That would be paradise. Buuuuut no. You know what you got? Level Run For Your Life. Good luck! There was a very good Level waiting for you on the other side!

_____________________________________________________________________________________________

UPDATE: 8/3/2025

  • New Greeting

  • Another is on the way.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________

Been a while since the last Backrooms card, thought I'd add the Partygoers to the list (it was a pain in the ass to find a Partygoer image that wasn't just 3D models).

_____________________________________________________________________________________________

Greetings:

Default: Entering The Level

Alternate Greeting 1: Threesome
